ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workforce_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the workforce data */,
  "week_in_year" INTEGER /* Week number within the year */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units (employees or resources) */,
  "hours" REAL /* Total hours worked */,
  "rate" REAL /* Hourly rate */,
  "direct_hours" REAL /* Direct hours worked on projects */,
  "indirect_hours" REAL /* Indirect hours worked (e.g., administrative tasks) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workforce data entry */,
  "overtime_hours" REAL /* Overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_rate" REAL /* Rate for overtime hours */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the workforce data entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "week_in_year", "project_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the project */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the project */,
  "total_hours_budgeted" REAL /* Total hours budgeted for the project */,
  "total_hours_spent" REAL /* Total hours spent on the project */,
  "total_cost_budgeted" REAL /* Total cost budgeted for the project */,
  "total_cost_spent" REAL /* Total cost spent on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project allocation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee allocated to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the allocation */,
  "week_in_year" INTEGER /* Week number within the year */,
  "direct_hours" REAL /* Direct hours allocated to the project */,
  "indirect_hours" REAL /* Indirect hours allocated to the project */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_allocations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_sheets" (
  "time_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time sheet */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who submitted the time sheet */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time sheet */,
  "week_in_year" INTEGER /* Week number within the year */,
  "total_hours" REAL /* Total hours worked in the week */,
  "direct_hours" REAL /* Direct hours worked on projects */,
  "indirect_hours" REAL /* Indirect hours worked */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "overtime_hours" REAL /* Overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_rate" REAL /* Rate for overtime hours */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_sheets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_sheets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role for which the rate applies */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department for which the rate applies */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate for the role or department */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the rate expires */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project cost entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the cost entry */,
  "week_in_year" INTEGER /* Week number within the year */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the week */,
  "direct_cost" REAL /* Direct cost for the week */,
  "indirect_cost" REAL /* Indirect cost for the week */,
  "overtime_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with overtime hours */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_costs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
column_names: Date of the workforce data entry
Total cost for the workforce data entry
